title: Sqlitelogictest algebra.rangejoin undefined
poc: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM tab2, tab1 AS cor0 CROSS JOIN tab1 WHERE cor0.col1 NOT BETWEEN tab2.col0 AND ( NULL );
CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT ALL * FROM tab1, tab2, tab2 AS cor0 WHERE + tab2.col2 BETWEEN ( tab1.col0 ) AND NULL;
SELECT * FROM tab0, tab2 AS cor0 WHERE ( - tab0.col0 ) BETWEEN ( cor0.col2 ) AND ( NULL );
key_bug_features: CROSS JOIN with NULL in BETWEEN clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1(col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER, col3 INTEGER NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test2(col1 INTEGER, col2 VARCHAR(50), col3 DATE);
SELECT * FROM test1 CROSS JOIN test2 WHERE test1.col2 BETWEEN test2.col1 AND NULL;
